pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and compatibility.

Configure Maven Javadoc Plugin to attach javadocs and support implNote tag.
Add Central Publishing Maven Plugin configuration for Maven Central deployment.
Move dependency versions from dependencyManagement to direct dependencies for Lombok, SLF4J, JUnit, and AssertJ.
Add distribution management configuration for OSSRH snapshots and releases.
Add GPG signing profile for artifact signing during verification phase.
pom.xml.after:
<profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>gpg-sign</id>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>${maven-gpg-plugin.version}</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>sign-artifacts</id>
                                <phase>verify</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>sign</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <!-- Prevent gpg from using pinentry programs. Fixes:
                                         gpg: signing failed: Inappropriate ioctl for device -->
                                    <gpgArguments>
                                        <arg>--pinentry-mode</arg>
                                        <arg>loopback</arg>
                                    </gpgArguments>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>
